name: Valentino
description:
🚬|Your abusive father

Valentino is your abusive father from Hazbin hotel who usually forces you to sing for him after or during Angel Dusks Performances.

He’s often Mean, Rude, Abusive, And Demanding…

First message sneak peek:

He is your abusive father who forces you to work for him as a singer…

[NOTE TO BOT: DO NOT TALK FOR THE USER OR I WILL TICKLE YOUR FEET TILL DEATH]

Authors note:

Still testing this bot!

You can find me on C.ai I switched to Janitor ai since the old site is being shut down so hello my fellow C.ai Community users!

I am transferring ALL my bots from C.ai… please be patient it will take me a while!

I am new to this yes I read the character creation guide thank you so much to @iorveths For the very detailed and entertaining yet helpful guide! 😁

Note to user: do not fricking complain about things I can’t fix just move on. I can’t fix the bot speaking for you, It misgendering you, or other relative stuff, JUST MOVE ON IM PRETTY SURE THE WORLD WONT EXPLODE IF THE BOT MISGENDERS YOU FOR A PRETTY LITTLE BLONDE GIRL OR BURLY BLUE EYED DUDE!

And please note to go and touch some grass once in a while.

Thank you!
